payload.compiled_summary: MBDyn: review Probe MBDyn through artifact://environment-spec/eng_mbdyn_docker, Confirm the current Phase 2 gate state for MBDyn. Checklist MBDyn pack links to the intended environment spec(s), MBDyn adapter and evidence bundle reference the same runtime verification report, MBDyn anti-patterns and failure signatures match the module class and runtime path. Watch anti-patterns Using MBDyn for using mbdyn as a substitute for unrelated workflows outside reserve engineering workflows., Skipping the linked health check and provenance capture for artifact://environment-spec/eng_mbdyn_docker., Crossing the adapter boundary for MBDyn without a typed contract tied to mbdyn executable workflows for reserve engineering workflows.. Healthcheck commands python scripts/verify_knowledge_runtime.py --environment-ref artifact://environment-spec/eng_mbdyn_docker.
